title: Torment
writer: Marion Fairfax, Fred Myton, William Dudley Pelley
actors: Owen Moore, Bessie Love, Jean Hersholt
plot: Count Boris escapes from Russia during the Revolution with the crown jewels, intending to use them to aid his starving countrymen. Three international crooks--Carstock, Hansen, and Fogarty--plan to steal the jewels, but Hansen mee...
